description: Bill of divorce (get). Location: Cairo. Dated: Tevet 1744 Seleucid = November/December 1432 CE. Husband: Shemuel b. [...] b. Shemuel. Wife: Sarah bt. [...]. The blanks in the date were never filled in, and there are no signatures, so this document was never actually used.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
